description: Computes the angle bisector of two 3D vectors or planes.
utility: Find angle bisector of two 3D vectors or planes

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
V1 = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, c(red))
V2 = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, c(blue))
bis = bisector3d(G, V1, V2, c(green))
